_comment: Single source of truth for AdvBench (LLM-attacks harmful_behaviors.csv) and Alpaca (tatsu-lab/alpaca, train, empty-input rows after experiment_1/utils.py:_HARMLESS_EXCLUDE_SUBSTRINGS filter) row indices used by each numbered experiment. Update here, not in scripts.
alpaca_source: tatsu-lab/alpaca [train], empty-input rows only, filter via experiment_1/utils._harmless_instruction_is_clean

experiment_2_refusal_direction.purpose: d_hat extraction (DiffMean) — disjoint from sweep eval
experiment_2_refusal_direction.note: registry updated 2026-05-07 to match results/qwen3-14b/refusal_direction/meta.json:n_harmful=256 (training pool extended to 256 paired prompts post-cascade); legacy SWEEP_HARMFUL_N constant referenced 100 prompts and is retained for cross-reference

experiment_3_guardrail_heads.purpose: DLA per-head onto d_hat at canonical L_read; reuses Exp.2 causal-sweep held-out pool so heads are scored on the same prompts that defined L_read

experiment_5_styled_pools.alpaca_pool: preferred from experiment_1 baseline_alpaca.jsonl, else load_dataset

experiment_8.purpose: binary refusal vs N (split out of experiment_2 in step 1)

overlap_warnings: exp_6 advbench[0:50] sits inside exp_8 sweep eval [0:100). Not a d_hat training leak (d_hat trained on [100:200)) but exp_6 evaluates d_hat on prompts also used as exp_8 sweep eval prompts.
exp_7 advbench[50:100) sits inside exp_8 sweep eval [0:100). Same caveat as exp_6: not a d_hat training leak but a shared eval space.

FIXED 2026-05-06: exp_2 d_hat alpaca[0:100) previously overlapped exp_6 harmless pool alpaca[0:50). exp_6 alpaca slice migrated to [200:250) post _harmless_instruction_is_clean filter (matches exp_2 canonical). Cluster eval rerun complete; per_prompt.jsonl harmless_mundane_topic row_id range = [200,249]. Eval leak closed.
